de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionLoopInvariant

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionLoopInvariant
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionLoopInvariant, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>

    public class ExecutionLoopInvariant
extends AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
implements IExecutionLoopInvariant
    The default implementation of IExecutionLoopInvariant.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
